pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Transparent Pricing
pricing.headDesc: Monthly subscription. Cancel anytime. No hidden fees.
pricing.upgradeBanner: Ready to boost your wheel sales?
pricing.faqA1: Monthly image credits do not roll over. They reset at the start of each billing period.
pricing.faqA2: You can cancel at any time. Your service remains active until the end of the current billing period.
pricing.faqQ3: How do WhatsApp lead notifications work?
pricing.faqA3: When a customer completes a visualization, you receive an automatic WhatsApp notification so you never miss a lead.
pricing.faqA4: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: At WheelVision, we collect the following data to provide our service:
s1Items: Email address and full name (account creation)
Car and wheel images you upload
IP address and browser info (for security)
privacy.s2Body: Your data is used solely for the following purposes:
privacy.s3Body: Your personal data is never sold to third parties. It is only shared with the technical infrastructure providers required to operate the service (Supabase, Cloudinary, Fal AI).
privacy.s4Body: Your uploaded images are securely stored on Cloudinary. When you delete your account, your data is deleted too.
privacy.s5Body: Only strictly necessary cookies for session management are used. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.
privacy.s6Body: You have the right to access, correct, and delete your data. For requests, contact us at
privacy.s7Body: For questions about our privacy policy:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: WheelVision is a B2C SaaS application that simulates wheel changes on vehicle images using AI technology.
s2Items: Each new account starts with 2 free credits.
terms.s3Body: You own the copyright of images you upload to the platform. Uploading content that infringes copyright, is obscene, or is illegal is strictly prohibited.
terms.s4Body: Images generated on the free plan carry a WheelVision watermark. A paid plan is required for commercial use.
terms.s5Body: WheelVision does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation of the service.
terms.s6Body: Accounts that violate these terms may be suspended or closed without prior notice.
terms.s7Body: These terms may be updated with prior notice.

features.title: Why
features.subtitle: Wrong wheels are expensive. We're here to prevent that.
features.f1Desc: ~30 seconds for high-quality AI visualization. No waiting.
features.f2Desc: Light, shadow and reflections matched automatically. Looks real.
features.f3Desc: Your images are encrypted, never shared with third parties.
features.f4Desc: Works on phone or tablet — access from anywhere.
features.f5Desc: 2 free credits, no card required. Try it now.
features.f6Desc: Custom showroom panel and customer interface for wheel dealers.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real users, real results
testimonials.q1: I was wondering how the wheels would look before buying. Thanks to WheelVision I saw that 18-inch black rims looked great on my BMW.
testimonials.q2: It was amazing to see how the wheels looked on my car before buying. I finally got the right wheels.
testimonials.q3: It's now so easy to let my customers try wheels on their cars virtually. Our sales increased 30%.
